modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to vote for SGA senators in Arts and Science.

full_description_text: I am experiencing an issue where I cannot cast my vote for the SGA senators within the Arts and Science category, despite being a Math major. This situation is quite confusing, as I expected to have access to vote in all relevant areas. It seems there might be a restriction or a glitch in the elections application that is preventing my participation. I would appreciate any assistance in resolving this matter.
short_description: Unable to vote for SGA senators in Arts and Science.
